title: Spanish II: Intermediate Conversation & Grammar
subtitle: SPAN-20 · A 3-week intensive
description: Move from simple present-tense sentences to talking about anything, in any time frame. An intermediate course in the structures that unlock real fluency: the preterite and imperfect past tenses and how to choose between them, object pronouns, reflexive verbs, commands, the future and conditional, the perfect tenses, comparisons, the por/para distinction, and a working command of the present subjunctive. Built around daily lectures, handwritten conjugation and composition, spaced repetition, speaking drills, quizzes, and projects.

lessons.title: Days 1 to 7: Preterite, Imperfect, Preterite vs. Imperfect, Object Pronouns
Days 8 to 14: Reflexives, Commands, Future, Conditional, Perfect Tenses, Comparisons, Por/Para
Days 15 to 21: The Present Subjunctive, Its Triggers, Professional Register, Connected Speech
